run_summary.summary: SOJOS came through today — Ruby approved the revised content (with voiceover) and is proactively requesting Liz's bank info to arrange payment. This is a big move: SOJOS goes from Approval to Scheduled. Liz needs to send her banking details and confirm her upload date ASAP. Everything else from yesterday (Flexsteel/Popfly deadline, Linkind SP6 content, Wise Block) was already captured in prior runs.

suggestions.message: 💸 Ruby at SOJOS Vision approved the content AND is asking for bank info to process payment. Liz needs to reply with banking details (Beneficiary Name, Bank name, Bank Address, Routing Number, Account Number, Swift Code) and confirm her posting date. Don't let this sit — they're ready to pay!

deals.next_action: Post SOJOS content and send bank info to Ruby for payment
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ruby (SOJOS Vision) approved revised content with voiceover — said 'Thanks so much! Let us know when you will upload!' She is also requesting bank info to arrange payment (Beneficiary Name, Bank name, Bank Address, Routing Number, Account Number, Swift Code).
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: SOJOS approved revised content with voiceover — moved Approval → Scheduled. Ruby also requesting bank info to process payment.
